title: Visitors
content: Visitors Mr Mukund Mitra, a Prime Minister Research Fellow from Robert Bosch Center for Cyber Physical Systems, Indian Institute of Science, Bengaluru is teaching robotics related courses to the final year students in ECE Department. Bridging the gap between Academic & Industry, 11th June 2022 Dr. Anita Singh,Scientist ‘E’ , IRDE, DRDO, Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India, 25th March 2022 Dr. Chandresh Kumar Maurya, Assistant Professor, CSE Department, IIT Indore, 25th March 2022 Dr. Jitendra Virmani, Senior Technical Officer, ISTC, CSIR-CSIO, 24th March 2022 Dr. Narendra D. Londhe, Associate Professor,Electrical Engineering Department, NIT Raipur, 23rd March 2022 Dr. Subrahmanyam Murala, Associate Professor, Electrical Engineering Department, IIT Ropar, 22nd March 2022
